titleStmt.title: SII 19.349: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 349. (A.R. No. 684 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGUḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE GAṆĒŚA SHRINE, NEḌUṄGAḶANĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an allotment of 12 kalam of paddy every year out of the produce from a field at Kaḷarikuṟichchi, made by Vēlveṭṭi Gōvinda-Bhattaṉ the śrīkāryam of the temple on behalf of Śembiyaṉ Vaḍapuṟaiyūrnāṭṭu-Mūvēndavēḷār a servant of Uttamaśōḻa-Brahmādhirāja, for the daily performance of agnikārya (fire oblation) during the three services in the temple of Mahādēva at Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam with ghee sacred twig etc. This has been surmised to be a record of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Published in South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. III. No. 140.
Digital edition of SII 19.349 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
